title: Human Civilization
description: Rise of early civilizations.

description: Construction of the Great Pyramid.

title: Fall of Rome
description: The fall of the Western Roman Empire.

title: Industrial Revolution
description: Transition to new manufacturing processes.

title: Moon Landing
description: Apollo 11 lands on the moon.

title: Internet Invented
description: ARPANET adopts TCP/IP.

title: First Smartphone
description: iPhone released.

title: COVID-19 Pandemic
description: Global pandemic begins.

title: First Hominins
description: Human lineage diverges from our common ancestor with chimpanzees.

title: Stone Tools
description: Early humans start shaping stone into cutting tools.

title: Fire Mastered
description: Controlled use of fire transforms diet and culture.

title: Agriculture
description: Humans settle and farm — end of nomadic life begins.

title: Writing Invented
description: Cuneiform in Mesopotamia — humanity's first records.

title: Bronze Age
description: Metallurgy enables stronger tools, weapons, and trade.

title: Iron Age
description: Iron smelting revolutionizes agriculture and warfare.

title: Democracy Born
description: Athens introduces direct democracy.

title: Alexander's Empire
description: Alexander the Great creates one of history's largest empires.

title: Gupta Empire
description: Golden age of India — science, math, art, and literature flourish.

title: Printing Press
description: Gutenberg's press democratizes knowledge and sparks revolution.

title: Scientific Revolution
description: Copernicus, Galileo, Newton — the birth of modern science.

title: Electricity Harnessed
description: Practical electricity transforms every aspect of civilization.

title: World War I
description: The Great War reshapes the global political order.

title: World War II
description: Deadliest conflict in human history — 70+ million lives lost.

title: DNA Discovered
description: Watson and Crick reveal the double helix — key to life's code.

title: Human Genome Mapped
description: Complete human DNA sequence decoded — revolutionizing medicine.

title: Social Media
description: Facebook launches — social networks reshape human communication.

title: GPT Released
description: OpenAI releases GPT — the dawn of the large language model era.

title: ChatGPT Launches
description: Conversational AI goes mainstream, reaching 100M users in two months.
